missing_connection: RULE_LOSS_ENABLE is false by default and training_project/train.py does not enable it or call set_rule_epoch().

answers.is_subclass_or_copy_of_ultralytics_v8Det: copy/bridge: defect_modules.loss.v8DetectionLoss is an externalized copy-style implementation, not a subclass of ultralytics.utils.loss.v8DetectionLoss.
answers.where_ruleloss_called: _build_rule_anchor_weights() is called from compute_loss() and compute_loss_aux(); __call__ routes to those functions.
answers.what_loss_is_modified: It builds per-anchor weights from target area and image contrast. Those weights multiply classification raw loss and target_scores passed into BboxLoss, so classification is directly weighted and box/DFL are indirectly affected through target_scores_rule.
answers.extra_inputs_needed: Uses batch['img'], target_bboxes, fg_mask, and schedule state from env/update or epoch settings.
answers.trainer_passes_required_info: The trainer passes normal batch tensors including img/cls/bboxes, but current training_project/train.py does not enable RULE_LOSS_ENABLE or set rule epochs.
